files.patch:
@@ -2023,2 +2023,2 @@
-  // Pattern:      src -> VectorMaskToLong -> AndL(mask) -> VectorLongToMask
-  // Replace with: src -> VectorMaskCast
+  // Pattern:      (VectorLongToMask (AndL (VectorMaskToLong src) mask))
+  // Replace with: (VectorMaskCast src)
@@ -2026,0 +2026,1 @@
+  //   The mask has exactly the vlen first bits on: mask = (2 << vlen - 1)
@@ -2034,2 +2035,1 @@
-        ((src_type->isa_vectmask() == nullptr && is_mask == nullptr) ||
-         (src_type->isa_vectmask() && is_mask))) {
+        ((src_type->isa_vectmask() == nullptr) == (is_mask == nullptr))) {

@@ -171,1 +171,1 @@
-                  IRNode.VECTOR_MASK_CAST,                      "> 0", // Not yet optimized away: Cast Z->Z
+                  IRNode.VECTOR_MASK_CAST,                      "> 0", // Not yet optimized away: Cast Z->Z, see JDK-8379866
@@ -222,1 +222,1 @@
-                  IRNode.VECTOR_MASK_CAST,                      "> 0", // Not yet optimized Z->Z
+                  IRNode.VECTOR_MASK_CAST,                      "> 0", // Not yet optimized Z->Z, see JDK-8379866
